repo.description: This is an open-source implementation of the ITU P.808 standard for "Subjective evaluation of speech quality with a crowdsourcing approach" (see https://www.itu.int/rec/T-REC-P.808/en). It uses Amazon Mechanical Turk as the crowdsourcing platform. It includes implementations for Absolute Category Rating (ACR), Degradation Category Rating (DCR), and Comparison Category Rating (CCR).
